prompts.text: Top-down professional food photography of authentic Korean Kimchi in a clean white ceramic dish. Vibrant red fermented napa cabbage, glistening with chili oil and sesame seeds, subtle moisture droplets, fresh and appetizing. Warm studio lighting with soft shadows, shot on an 85mm lens, ultra-sharp focus, shallow depth of field, high-end commercial grade food styling, isolated on a pure white background.

Top-down professional food photography of piping hot Korean Sundubu Jjigae (soft tofu stew) in a traditional red earthenware bowl. Silken tofu, green onions, and red chili oil shimmering on the surface with rising steam, appetizing glossy textures. Warm dramatic studio lighting, shot on 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, commercial food styling, ultra-sharp detail, isolated on a clean white background.

High-end commercial food photography of Korean Naengmyeon (cold buckwheat noodles) served in a chilled brass metal bowl, slightly elevated angle view. Hand-stretched noodles topped with cucumber julienne, boiled egg, beef slice, and ice-cold broth with condensation droplets on the bowl. Soft natural window lighting, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, appetizing glossy finish, ultra-sharp details, isolated on a seamless white background.

Overhead flat lay studio shot of Korean Doenjang Jjigae (fermented soybean paste stew) bubbling in a black earthen Ttukbaegi pot. Visible cubes of tofu, zucchini, mushrooms, and scallions in a rich, savory broth. Soft natural window-style lighting, professional food photography, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, pristine commercial food styling, isolated on a solid white background.

Close-up macro food photography of a Korean Bingsu shaved ice dessert piled high in a modern ceramic bowl. Fluffy milk snow ice topped with sweet red beans, chewy tteok rice cakes, and a drizzle of condensed milk. Bright even studio lighting, 85mm lens, shallow depth of field, crisp appetizing details, commercial stock photo, isolated on a pure white background.

Close-up macro shot of a golden-brown Korean Hotteok sweet griddle pancake neatly sliced in half, revealing the oozing, glossy melted brown sugar, cinnamon, and peanut filling. Crispy dough texture, warm appetizing glow. Bright even studio lighting, professional food styling, 85mm lens, ultra-sharp focus, shallow depth of field, commercial grade, isolated on a clean white background.

Studio commercial product photography of an elegant Korean traditional tea set, featuring a minimalist white ceramic teapot and two matching cups, arranged in a balanced composition at a 45-degree angle. Gentle diffused natural light casting soft shadows, highlighting the delicate matte texture of the ceramic. High-detail sharp focus, elegant zen-like aesthetic, isolated on a seamless white background.

Minimalist commercial photography of a traditional Korean Hanok courtyard layout, showcasing a clean gray stone pathway, wooden pillars, and tiled patterns. Top-down overhead flat lay perspective, bright even soft-shadow studio lighting, capturing intricate textures of wood and stone with cultural authenticity. Sharp focus, high-end architectural layout style, isolated on a crisp white background.

Studio product photograph of a traditional Korean folding fan (Hapjukseon) partially opened, displaying an elegant hand-painted ink landscape. Shot at a 45-degree angle to showcase the texture of the Hanji (Korean mulberry paper) and bamboo ribs. Bright even soft studio lighting, sharp focus, high-detail cultural heritage commercial shot, isolated on a pure white background.

Commercial high-detail photograph of a structural segment of traditional Korean Hanok dark-grey clay roof tiles (Giwa) and curved eaves, top-down flat perspective. Soft, diffused natural studio lighting accentuating the smooth elegant curves and clay texture of the architecture. Crisp sharp focus, architectural element asset, isolated on a solid white background.

Flat vector illustration of a single bowl of Korean Japchae glass noodles with colorful vegetables, three-quarter view. Minimalist flat vector illustration of a single plate of Korean Kimchi cabbage, flat lay view from directly above. Clean graphic shapes, modern flat icon design style, bold stylized colors of red and green, crisp vector lines, commercial design asset, isolated on a solid light cream background.

Centered modern flat vector illustration of a single Korean traditional ceramic tea cup filled with steaming green tea.
